description: Style Note girls will love the cute look of these shorts from gini and jony. Team them with a T-shirt and sandals for a summery look. Product Details Pink shorts with a comfortable waistband with drawstrings, contrast panelling on the sides and at the hems and embroidered branding above the left hem  Material and Care 95% cotton and 5% lycra Machine wash cool with like colours using a mild detergent Do not tumble dry, bleach or soak Wash and dry inside out in shade Warm iron only Do not iron on print/embroidery
